emails.subject: Emerson Electric Co.
emails.body: Emerson Electric Co. The referenced counterparty is on the 3/1/01 list. You've got them shut down for power, but Credit's notes are specifically opening them for power. Should I open or shut down?

emails.subject: Re: Emerson Electric Co.
emails.body: Re: Emerson Electric Co. Shut down for power. They are not FERC suthorized nor are they a current CP. I am overriding Credit! Tana Jones 03/09/2001 11:14 AM
